gate_checks.name: sample_coverage
gate_checks.detail: each selected algorithm produced one row per sample fund

gate_checks.name: simulated_holding_threshold_metrics
gate_checks.detail: TE and top10 recall are present for threshold review

gate_checks.name: algorithm_thresholds
gate_checks.detail: all selected algorithms are not fail

gate_checks.name: estimated_isolation
gate_checks.detail: P2B conclusions remain estimated/needs_review, never fact/computed

simulated_holding.reason: naive_replication passed pipeline thresholds, but remains an estimated optional view until stricter product gates are defined

dynamic_attribution.reason: uses proxy benchmark/sector returns; formal attribution needs real benchmark data

scoring.reason: only 2 verified scoring dimensions; score backtest still required
